abbreviateSkills.hint: Display skill and ability names as a three-character abbreviation
abbreviateSkills.name: Abbreviate Skill and Ability Names

displaySpellInfo.hint: Display spell component information, concentration, and ritual status next to the spell's name
displaySpellInfo.name: Display Spell Information

showActivitiesAsActions.hint: Show each activity on an item as its own action. When clicking an activity action, the activity is executed directly. When disabled, each item is a single action and clicking the action will display the activity selection window (unless skipped).
showActivitiesAsActions.name: Show Activities as Actions

showItemsWithoutActivationCosts.hint: Show items with an Activation Cost of "None".
showItemsWithoutActivationCosts.name: Show Items without Activation Costs

showSlowActions.hint: Show actions that take longer than one round.
showSlowActions.name: Show Slow Actions

showSpellsAcrossGroups.hint: Show each spell in every spell-slot group it can be cast from. When disabled, spells appear only in their base spell-slot group.
showSpellsAcrossGroups.name: Show Spells in All Castable Groups

showUnchargedItems.hint: Show items with no charges remaining.
showUnchargedItems.name: Show Uncharged Items

showUnequippedItems.hint: For player characters, show unequipped inventory items. When disabled, only equipped inventory items are shown.
showUnequippedItems.name: Show Unequipped Items for PCs

showUnequippedItemsNpcs.hint: For NPCs, show unequipped inventory items. When disabled, only equipped inventory items are shown.
showUnequippedItemsNpcs.name: Show Unequipped Items for NPCs
